# Nasdaq x Gold Rotation

> A fully algorithmic trading strategy that rotates between leveraged Nasdaq-100
> and Gold. Trend-following with volatility-based exposure and a protective stop.
> Traded live with real money since February 2026. The exact parameters are private.

Key facts:
- Backtested over 40 years of index data: ~40% backtested CAGR (model, not a promise).
- Highly volatile: model maximum drawdown about -62%, and leveraged instruments can lose value rapidly.
- Live performance is published on this page and updated daily (indexed to 100 at live inception).
- The strategy can be copied on eToro: https://www.etoro.com/people/pauladrienb
- Author: Paul Adrien.

This is not investment advice. Past and simulated performance do not guarantee future results.
